name: RAGFlow
description: Open-source RAG engine with deep document parsing (tables, charts, images) and an official MCP server. Deploy via Docker, call via REST API. 80k GitHub stars.

skills.name: Deep Document Parse
skills.description: Parse complex documents — tables, charts, multi-column layouts — with layout-aware chunking for accurate retrieval.

skills.name: Knowledge Retrieval
skills.description: Query ingested knowledge bases via hybrid search (semantic + keyword) with source-cited answers.

skills.name: Agent Workflows
skills.description: Build multi-step agentic workflows in a canvas UI that call RAG, APIs, and external tools in sequence.
